keySource: Hardcoded in CONFIG.API_SALT, decoded from obfuscated string table
paramFormat: sorted keys joined by & with key=value pairs, then |timestamp|salt appended
pseudoCode: def sign_request(params, timestamp): keys = sorted(params.keys()); param_str = '&'.join(f'{k}={params[k]}' for k in keys); return md5(f'{param_str}|{timestamp}|{SALT}').hexdigest()
